source_description: Slice 1 of the home-maintenance app: Properties + one-shot Jobs with ordered Step checklists, secured by Google OIDC with ownership-based authz. Slice 1b adds Assets; Slice 2 adds recurrence (JobDefinition + JobOccurrence).

amendments.text: Files changed outside declared WP scope: backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/Endpoints/PropertyEndpoints.cs, backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/HomeMaintenance.API.csproj, backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/Program.cs (and 10 more)
Files changed outside declared WP scope: frontend/src/app/properties/[id]/page.tsx, frontend/src/components/create-job-form.tsx, frontend/src/components/job-card.tsx (and 1 more)

Files changed outside declared WP scope: backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/Endpoints/JobEndpoints.cs, backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/Middleware/ResultToHttpExtensions.cs, backend/src/HomeMaintenance.API/Program.cs (and 6 more)
